title: Portfolio landing page
objective: Add a portfolio-ready landing page that explains the project, architecture, demo flow, and career-relevant implementation highlights.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Create a landing page or static docs page with problem, solution, architecture, demo, screenshots/diagrams, and implementation status.
Include concise positioning: repo-resident agentic software factory, not finished autonomous developer.
Link to PRD/spec PDF, diagrams, task backlog, and demo command sequence.
Add sections for what is implemented, what is planned, and what is intentionally out of scope.
Keep claims realistic and avoid describing the project as production-ready until gates prove it.

expectedArtifacts: tests or fixtures when behavior changes
updated documentation if user-facing behavior changes
koObjective: 이 프로젝트를 커리어 포트폴리오로 보여줄 랜딩 페이지를 만든다.

koGuide.요약: 이 작업은 Codex가 Dev Container 안에서 자동 구현할 수 있도록 설계된 단계별 task packet입니다.
